overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving from a desert highway approach into the dense urban center of Night City. The drive features futuristic skyscrapers, prominent billboards, and distinctive architecture including the Arasaka building, viewed from inside a car with a detailed dashboard and a small figure on the console.

events.description: vehicle enters underpass/tunnel structure, lighting shifts to artificial

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the highway toward the city skyline, maintaining center lane position

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car overtakes on the left side around 10 seconds

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt highway stretching toward the distant city
futuristic skyscrapers and towers of Night City visible on the horizon
arid mountain range forming the backdrop to the city
futuristic car interior with red accents and a small figure mounted on the console
concrete and metal highway barriers lining both sides of the road
large overhead gantry with signage marking the city entrance
large digital advertisements and corporate signage along the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert highway driving toward the distant Night City skyline. The vehicle approaches a toll gate structure with overhead billboards, maintaining a steady speed. The environment is open and sunlit with sparse desert vegetation and mountains visible to the right, transitioning into an underpass at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated curved highway ramp with industrial structures

events.description: exits underpass back into direct sunlight, brightening the scene significantly
vehicle navigates a sharp right curve on the elevated ramp

agents.ego_description: navigating a curved elevated ramp, steering right while maintaining speed

entered.detail: raised highway structure with concrete barriers and metal fencing
distinctive industrial building with yellow structural scaffolding and crisscross patterns
tall black skyscraper with the Arasaka corporation logo visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the vehicle enters an elevated curved highway ramp. The distinctive yellow scaffolding building dominates the right side as the road curves right. The Arasaka building becomes visible in the distance ahead, marking the transition into the dense urban core. The lighting shifts from artificial tunnel lighting back to bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway through downtown district

events.description: industrial smoke plume becomes visible on the left side of the highway

agents.ego_description: cruising on the straight elevated highway through the city center, passing other vehicles and billboards

notable_agents.action: white van driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings and towers lining the highway
white smoke plume rising from industrial structures near the highway
overhead directional signage and traffic control structures

segments.scene_description: The final segment features driving on a straight elevated highway through the heart of Night City. The Arasaka building looms large on the right side while various corporate billboards and advertisements line both sides of the road. The vehicle passes through moderate traffic with an industrial smoke plume visible in the distance, maintaining a steady cruise through the dense urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from an open desert highway into the dense, towering urban core of Night City. It begins on a wide, sunlit road flanked by sparse vegetation and distant mountains, moving steadily toward a toll gate structure topped with overhead billboards. As the vehicle passes through a dark underpass, the open landscape vanishes, and the lighting shifts from natural sunlight to artificial tunnel glows. The scene then opens onto an elevated curved highway ramp where the environment transforms into a concrete jungle, dominated by a massive yellow scaffolding building on the right. Finally, the road curves rightward as the Arasaka building emerges in the distance, signaling the full transition into the city's futuristic skyline.

The shot follows a continuous drive along an elevated highway that plunges deeper into the corporate heart of Night City. It begins with a steady cruise through moderate traffic, where the road is flanked by a dense corridor of glowing advertisements and corporate billboards. As the vehicle advances, the perspective shifts to emphasize the scale of the urban environment, with the massive Arasaka building looming large over the right side of the highway. The scene then opens up to reveal an industrial smoke plume drifting in the far distance before the camera maintains its forward momentum through the towering architectural canyon.
